---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve / 创建一个 bug 报告帮助我们改进
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug / 描述问题
A clear and concise description of what happened.
清晰简洁地描述发生了什么。

## Steps to reproduce / 复现步骤
1. ...
2. ...

## Expected behavior / 预期结果
What you expected to happen.
描述你期望发生的行为。

## Environment / 环境信息
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Version: [e.g. v1.0.0]
- Node.js version (CLI mode): [e.g. v20.10.0]

## Screenshots or logs / 截图或日志
If applicable, attach screenshots or paste log output.
如果可以，请上传截图或粘贴日志信息。
